---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, unclear, or incorrect documentation
title: '[DOCS]'
labels: 'documentation'

---

## Summary

What is missing, unclear, or incorrect?

## Where

- Page / file: (e.g. `docs-vitepress/versions/latest/guide/...` or a URL)
- Version affected: (stable `0.13` / latest / both)

## Why this helps

Who is confused or blocked, and in which workflow.

## Suggested change

A clear description of what the docs should say instead. Include example code
or wording if you can.

## Notes for contributors

Anything that makes this easier to pick up (related pages, the writing-style
guide in `CLAUDE.md`, etc.).
